options.text: Why are you leaving so early?
I don’t believe you have a meeting.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Alright, see you later.' 是自然、礼貌的告别回应，符合语境。干扰项 'Why are you leaving...' 和 'Can you reschedule...' 显得不礼貌或干涉对方安排，'I don't believe you...' 则是质疑对方，完全不符合礼貌告别原则。

content.speakerText: I’m gonna grab another coffee—wanna join?
content.speakerTextCn: 我去再买杯咖啡，一起吗？

options.text: Thanks, I’ll pass—I’ll catch you later!
You always drink too much coffee.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thanks, I’ll pass—I’ll catch you later!' 婉拒时表达感谢并留下友好余地。干扰项 'No, I hate coffee.' 太直接且带主观评价，'You always drink too much...' 是批评，'I’m busy, go alone.' 冷淡无礼，均不符合礼貌告别场景。

content.speakerText: I should head out soon—got an early start tomorrow.

options.text: Oh, so you’re boring and never stay late?
No problem! Have a great night’s sleep!
Why are you leaving so early? We just started!
Can I come with you to your house?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No problem! Have a great night’s sleep!' 体现了理解、祝福和自然收尾。干扰项 'so you’re boring...' 是人身攻击，'Why are you leaving...' 显得不耐烦，'Can I come with you?' 超出语境，不合逻辑。

content.hint: 这是表达‘聊得很开心’的固定搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：nice chatting with you

content.template: Thanks, but I’m good—I’ll ______ you next time!
content.hint: 这是一个常用口语短语，表示‘下次再聊’
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配：catch you next time

content.template: I’ve got to go, but ______ you a great day!
content.hint: 告别时常用的祝福句型结构
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：wish sb a great day

expectedAnswers: No worries, have a great meeting!
Same here! Hope it goes well!
Okay, take care and good luck!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否自然结束对话且表达理解
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合口语习惯，避免生硬或过度正式
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'meeting', 'take care', 'good luck' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I’m gonna grab another coffee—wanna join?
content.speakerTextCn: 我去再买杯咖啡，一起吗？
expectedAnswers: Thanks, but I’m all set—I’ll catch you later!
That sounds nice, but I should head out. Have a great one!
Appreciate it! Not today, but let’s grab coffee soon!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌婉拒且不伤害对方感受
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'thanks but', 'catch you', 'head out' 等表达
表达自然度：是否避免生硬拒绝如 'No' 或 'I don’t want to'
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thanks', 'catch you', 'have a great one', 'soon' 等礼貌告别关键词

content.speakerText: It’s getting late—I should probably head home.
expectedAnswers: Totally understand—have a safe trip home!
Yeah, me too. Let’s chat again soon!
Good night! Don’t work too hard tomorrow!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应对方的告别意图并表达关心
语言准确性：语法和用词是否自然得体
表达自然度：是否避免机械重复或过度夸张
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'head home', 'safe trip', 'chat again', 'good night' 等相关表达
